title: 高松宮記念の後に・奮い立て

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither King nor I win the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen... But King is still proud of her decision to
remain true to herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me to take pride in being myself without
worrying about what anyone else thinks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must stop being afraid of hurting others and
behave in a way that's true to myself! I decide to
participate in the talk show at the Fan Fest as a
way to show my conviction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's scary, of course, but I have someone by my
side who reassures me that I'm not alone!
